hawkish_phrases: self-imposed limits might hamper action required to fulfil its mandate
the Governing Council's policy actions had to remain clearly within its remit
higher risk of being perceived as getting closer to monetary financing
these limits were one of the safeguards to ensure that the Governing Council acted within its mandate
terminate net asset purchases under the PEPP once it judged that the coronavirus crisis phase was over
dovish_phrases: do everything necessary within its mandate
fully prepared to increase the size of its asset purchase programmes and adjust their composition, by as much as necessary and for as long as needed
significant risk of a major recession in the euro area
extreme economic shock that required an ambitious, coordinated and urgent policy reaction
summary: The ECB unanimously launched an emergency €750 billion PEPP in response to the COVID-19 pandemic, expanded eligible assets, eased collateral standards, and pledged to do everything necessary within its mandate to counter severe economic deterioration and impaired monetary transmission.
